2606.20002.title: Connect the Dots: Training LLMs for Long-Lifecycle Agents with Cross-Domain Generalization Via Reinforcement Learning
2606.20002.paper_summary: This work presents a general framework for training large language models (LLMs) to "Connect the Dots" (CoD), a meta-capability required by long-lifecycle agents: as an LLM-based AI agent gets deployed in an environment, it solves a long sequence of tasks while continuously exploring the environment, learning from its own experiences, and iteratively self-updating its context about the environment, thereby achieving progressively better performance on future tasks conditioned on the updated context. Major components of the CoD framework include: (1) algorithm design and infrastructure for end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) with long rollout sequences interleaving solve-task and update-context episodes; (2) tasks and environments for incentivizing and eliciting the targeted meta-capability in LLMs during training, as well as for faithfully measuring progress during evaluation. We present proof-of-concept implementations of the CoD framework, including a GRPO-style RL algorithm with fine-grained credit assignment, as well as tasks and environments tailored to the targeted meta-capability (rather than domain-specific LLM capabilities or standard task-by-task RL). Empirical results validate the efficacy of end-to-end RL training in the CoD setting, and demonstrate the potential for out-of-distribution generalization -- within the training domains, across different domains, and from CoD to Ralph-loop settings -- of the elicited meta-capability. Our investigation of CoD connects several lines of prior works, and opens up new opportunities for advancing LLMs and AI agents. To facilitate further research and applications, we release our implementations at \url{https://github.com/agentscope-ai/Trinity-RFT/tree/research/cod/examples/research_cod}.
2606.20002.paper_summary_zh: 這項工作提出了一個訓練大型語言模型（LLMs）以「連接點」(CoD) 的一般框架，這是一種長生命周期代理所需的元能力：當基於LLM的AI代理在環境中部署時，它解決了一系列長任務，同時不斷探索環境，從自身經驗中學習，並迭代地自我更新其對環境的上下文，從而在基於更新上下文的未來任務上實現逐步更好的表現。CoD框架的主要組成部分包括：(1) 用於端到端強化學習（RL）的算法設計和基礎設施，長的展開序列交錯解決任務和更新上下文的情節；(2) 用於激勵和引發LLMs在訓練過程中目標元能力的任務和環境，以及在評估過程中忠實測量進展的工具。我們展示了CoD框架的概念驗證實現，包括一種具有細粒度信用分配的GRPO風格RL算法，以及針對目標元能力量身定制的任務和環境（而不是特定領域的LLM能力或標準的逐任務RL）。實證結果驗證了在CoD設置中端到端RL訓練的有效性，並展示了引發的元能力在訓練領域內、跨不同領域以及從CoD到Ralph-loop設置的分佈外泛化潛力。我們對CoD的研究連結了幾條先前工作的線索，並為推進LLMs和AI代理開辟了新的機會。為了促進進一步的研究和應用，我們在 \url{https://github.com/agentscope-ai/Trinity-RFT/tree/research/cod/examples/research_cod} 發布了我們的實現。
2606.20002.author: Yanxi Chen et.al.
2606.20002.authors: Yanxi Chen, Weijie Shi, Yuexiang Xie, Boyi Hu, Yaliang Li, Bolin Ding, Jingren Zhou
